title: Frost Spear
description: FrostSpear is a magical Minecraft plugin that adds a one-of-a-kind weapon to your server.
body:
**FrostSpear** is a magical Minecraft plugin that adds a one-of-a-kind weapon to your server: the **Frost Spear**. Wield it wisely — it can freeze your enemies in place and dominate the battlefield!  

---

## 🌟 Features

- **Unique Weapon**: &9Frost Spear — a custom trident with a freeze ability.  
- **Freeze Ability**: Shift + Right Click activates a circle of blue particles that freezes all nearby players (3-block radius) for 3 seconds.  
- **Player Immunity**: The user of the Frost Spear is immune to its effects.  
- **Trust System**: `/trust <player>` allows you to exempt specific players from being frozen.  
- **Single-Craft Limit**: The Frost Spear can only be crafted once per server.  
- **Cooldown**: 90 seconds between uses.  
- **Visual Effects**: Stunning blue particle circle when activating the spear.  
- **Entity Support**: Works on players and other entities.

---

## ⚒ Crafting Recipe

The Frost Spear can be crafted **only once** using the following pattern:  


A D N
A B D
B A A

- `D` = Diamond Block  
- `N` = Nether Star  
- `B` = Breeze Rod  
- `A` = Air  

> Crafting again is not allowed. Crafting status is saved in `config.yml`.  

---

## 📜 Commands


/trust

- Trust a player so they won't be frozen.  
- Not persistent through server restarts.  
- Cooldowns and freeze messages are handled automatically.  

---

## 💾 Configuration

The plugin automatically saves the following to `config.yml`:  

- Whether the Frost Spear has been crafted  
- Trusted players (session-based)  

No manual configuration is required.  

---

## ⚠️ Notes

- Only one Frost Spear can exist per server.  
- Cooldowns and trust are session-based; trust resets on server restart.  
- Works on Minecraft 1.21+  

---
